name: Spatial PPI v2
description: Predict PPI between two proteins from sequence or structural information. Use protein language models and graph attention networks. Outperforms state of the art PPI methods like D-Script and GNN-PPI.
capabilities: Predict PPI between two proteins from sequence or structural information
Use protein language models and graph attention networks
Outperforms state of the art PPI methods like D-Script and GNN-PPI

protein_a_sequence.description: Amino acid sequence of the first protein

protein_b_sequence.description: Amino acid sequence of the second protein

protein_a_structure.description: Optional structure of the first protein in PDB format for structure-based prediction

protein_b_structure.description: Optional structure of the second protein in PDB format for structure-based prediction
